name: LCP p95 - {{ENV_LABEL}} - warn
description: Largest Contentful Paint p95 exceeds 2.5 seconds (poor user experience)
query: SELECT quantile(0.95)(lcp) AS value FROM rum_events WHERE app_id = '{{RUM_APP_ID}}' AND event_type = 'web_vitals' AND lcp > 0 AND timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 30 MINUTE

name: CLS p50 - {{ENV_LABEL}} - warn
description: Cumulative Layout Shift p50 exceeds 0.1 (visible layout instability)
query: SELECT quantile(0.50)(cls) AS value FROM rum_events WHERE app_id = '{{RUM_APP_ID}}' AND event_type = 'web_vitals' AND cls >= 0 AND timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 30 MINUTE

name: INP p50 - {{ENV_LABEL}} - warn
description: Interaction to Next Paint p50 exceeds 200ms (sluggish interactions)
query: SELECT quantile(0.50)(inp) AS value FROM rum_events WHERE app_id = '{{RUM_APP_ID}}' AND event_type = 'web_vitals' AND inp > 0 AND timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 30 MINUTE

name: TTFB p50 - {{ENV_LABEL}} - warn
description: Time to First Byte p50 exceeds 800ms (slow server response)
query: SELECT quantile(0.50)(ttfb) AS value FROM rum_events WHERE app_id = '{{RUM_APP_ID}}' AND event_type = 'web_vitals' AND ttfb > 0 AND timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 30 MINUTE
